name: Hanjia Design Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Hanjia Design Group Co., Ltd. engages in architecture and engineering activities in China. The company is involved in planning, architecture, landscape architecture, interior decoration and engineering of municipal administration, intelligence, curtain walls, and geotechnical engineering, as well as construction drawing review, energy saving assessment, and transportation assessment. Hanjia Design Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
